name: Krasnoyarsk Krai (Russia)

colors.symbolism: the principal field; recalls the historic banner colour of Russia

description: A red field charged in the centre with the Krasnoyarsk Krai coat of arms - a golden lion bearing a sickle and shovel, framed by a wreath and a light-blue ribbon.
history: Adopted on 16 March 2000. The lion bearing a sickle and shovel is taken from the historic arms of Yeniseisk Governorate.

features.symbolism: a golden lion holding a sickle in its left hand and a shovel in its right hand, set on a golden pedestal and framed by a wreath of cedar and oak leaves with a light-blue ribbon on the left, right, and bottom; symbolises agricultural and mining wealth of the krai.
